scope.target: Remove the obsolete Codex prompt wrapper layer
scope.dependency_radius: .codex, .ai/assets, repo indexes, AI asset strategy guides
non_goals: Do not remove Gemini or Copilot wrapper layers

inputs.architecture_target: Simplify the Codex adapter model by removing prompt wrappers and keeping runtime skills only
user_constraints: The related prompts already exist under .ai and the extra Codex prompt layer is no longer needed

steps: Removed Codex prompt wrapper mappings from canonical assets and kept the canonical paths on the sub-agent model
Updated repository documentation to point Codex users to .codex/skills instead
validation: No tracked Codex prompt wrapper files remain
Repository docs no longer present .codex/prompts as an active Codex entry point
deferred_items: Clean up any historical references inside archived workflow notes only if desired
Clean historical workflow notes that still mention the removed command-spec layer if desired

results.summary: Removed the obsolete Codex prompt wrapper layer and aligned docs with the runtime-skill-first approach.
